name: address
title: Address Form
description: Compound Address primitives (Root, Email, FirstName, LastName, Phone, AddressLine2, City, Company, Country, PostalCode, Autocomplete, Province, BillingToggle, Billing) plus an AddressForm preset. Owns cart writes via the sveltekit-medusa-sdk cart remotes (DI-with-SDK-default + onaddresschange/onregionchange/onerror callbacks): debounced updateCart, region-by-country switching, billing same-as-shipping toggle, and Google Places autocomplete (optional; degrades to text). Receives the consumer's remote form (renders no <form>). No $effect (SSR-safe; hydrates via onMount).

files.content: {#if form.fields?.hideBilling} {/if} {@render children()}

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Email address', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields.email} type="email" {label} autocomplete="email" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let {
		label = 'First name',
		prefix = '',
		class: className = '',
		...rest
	}: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>

<InputText
	field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}first_name`]}
	{label}
	autocomplete="given-name"
	onChange={ctx.onchange}
	class={className}
	{...rest}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Last name', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}last_name`]} {label} autocomplete="family-name" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Phone number', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}phone`]} type="tel" {label} autocomplete="tel" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Apt/Suite', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}address_2`]} {label} autocomplete="address-line2" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'City', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}city`]} {label} autocomplete="address-level2" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Company', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}company`]} {label} autocomplete="organization" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputSelectCountry from '../input-select-country/input-select-country.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Country', prefix = '', placeholder = 'Select a country…', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; placeholder?: string; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputSelectCountry field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}country_code`]} countries={ctx.countries} {label} {placeholder} autocomplete="country" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import InputPostalCode from '../input-postal-code/input-postal-code.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Postal code', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputPostalCode field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}postal_code`]} {label} autocomplete="postal-code" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

<script lang="ts">
	import GooglePlacesAutocomplete from '../google-places-autocomplete/google-places-autocomplete.svelte'
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import * as Field from '$lib/components/ui/field/index.js'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	import type { NormalizedAddress } from '../google-places-autocomplete/types'

	let { label = 'Address', prefix = '', placeholder = 'Enter address', class: className = '' }:
		{ label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; placeholder?: string; class?: string } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
	const field = $derived(ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}address_1`])

	async function onselect(addr: NormalizedAddress) {
		await ctx.setAddressFromAutocomplete(addr, prefix)
		// Collapse the GPAC input to just the street line; city/province/postal/country moved to their fields.
		return addr.address_1
	}
	function oninput(text: string) {
		field.set(text)
		ctx.save()
	}
</script>

{#if ctx.isAutocomplete}
	<Field.Field>
		{#if label}<Field.FieldLabel>{label}</Field.FieldLabel>{/if}
		<GooglePlacesAutocomplete apiKey={ctx.googlePlacesApiKey!} {placeholder} initialValue={field.value()} {onselect} {oninput} class={className} />
	</Field.Field>
{:else}
	<InputText {field} {label} {placeholder} autocomplete="address-line1" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} />
{/if}

<script lang="ts">
	import InputProvince from '../input-province/input-province.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label, prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
	const field = $derived(ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}province`])
	const country = $derived(ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}country_code`]?.value() ?? '')
</script>
<InputProvince {field} {country} config={ctx.provinceConfig} {label} autocomplete="address-level1" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

{#if ctx.showBilling}
{/if}

<script lang="ts">
	import InputText from '../input-text/input-text.svelte'
	import { getAddressContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	let { label = 'Address', prefix = '', class: className = '', ...rest }: { label?: string; prefix?: '' | 'billing_'; class?: string; [k: string]: unknown } = $props()
	const ctx = getAddressContext()
</script>
<InputText field={ctx.form.fields[`${prefix}address_1`]} {label} autocomplete="address-line1" onchange={ctx.onchange} class={className} {...rest} />

{@const ctx = getAddressContext()}
{#if !ctx.expanded}
{/if}

import type { RemoteForm } from '@sveltejs/kit'
import type { StoreCart, StoreRegion } from '@medusajs/types'
import type { ProvinceConfig } from '../input-province/provinces'
import type { NormalizedAddress } from '../google-places-autocomplete/types'

export type { ProvinceConfig }

export type CartAddress = {
	first_name: string
	last_name: string
	address_1: string
	address_2: string
	city: string
	province: string
	postal_code: string
	country_code: string
	phone: string
	company?: string
}

export type UpdateCartArgs = {
	email?: string
	region_id?: string
	shipping_address?: CartAddress
	billing_address?: CartAddress | Record<string, never>
	metadata?: Record<string, unknown>
}

// SDK remotes, typed structurally so tests inject plain fakes.
export type GetCartFn = () => { current: StoreCart | null | undefined; set?: (c: StoreCart) => void }
export type GetRegionsFn = () => Promise<StoreRegion[]> & { current: StoreRegion[] | undefined }
export type UpdateCartFn = (args: UpdateCartArgs) => Promise<StoreCart | null>

export type Country = { code: string; name: string }

export type UpdateAddress = () => Promise<StoreCart | null>

export type AddressContext = {
	readonly form: RemoteForm<any, any>
	readonly cart: StoreCart | null | undefined
	readonly regions: StoreRegion[] | undefined
	readonly countries: Country[]
	readonly provinceConfig: ProvinceConfig
	readonly googlePlacesApiKey: string | undefined
	readonly isAutocomplete: boolean
	readonly billingSameAsShipping: boolean
	readonly showBilling: boolean
	readonly expanded: boolean
	setExpanded: (v: boolean) => void
	updateAddress: UpdateAddress
	onchange: (event: Event) => void
	save: () => Promise<void>
	setRegionForCountry: (code: string) => Promise<void>
	setBillingSameAsShipping: (same: boolean) => void
	setAddressFromAutocomplete: (addr: NormalizedAddress, prefix?: string) => Promise<void>
}

export { default as Root } from './address-root.svelte'
export { default as Email } from './address-email.svelte'
export { default as FirstName } from './address-first-name.svelte'
export { default as LastName } from './address-last-name.svelte'
export { default as Phone } from './address-phone.svelte'
export { default as AddressLine2 } from './address-line2.svelte'
export { default as City } from './address-city.svelte'
export { default as Company } from './address-company.svelte'
export { default as Country } from './address-country.svelte'
export { default as PostalCode } from './address-postal-code.svelte'
export { default as Autocomplete } from './address-autocomplete.svelte'
export { default as Province } from './address-province.svelte'
export { default as BillingToggle } from './address-billing-toggle.svelte'
export { default as Billing } from './address-billing.svelte'
export { default as AddressForm } from './address-form.svelte'
export { default as AddressLine1 } from './address-line1.svelte'
export { default as AddressFormCollapsed } from './address-form-collapsed.svelte'
export { setAddressContext, getAddressContext, getAddressContextOptional } from './ctx.svelte.js'
export { readAddress, buildUpdatePayload, ADDRESS_KEYS } from './address-logic.js'
export type { AddressContext, UpdateAddress, CartAddress, UpdateCartArgs, GetCartFn, GetRegionsFn, UpdateCartFn, ProvinceConfig, Country as CountryType } from './types.js'
